title: Create: Enhanced Vanilla
description: A Lightweight Modpack Focused Around the Create Mod and Exploring
body:
![Create Enhanced Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/800ef44ee8b086ccda52644c4188069e047ca54b.png)
# About this pack:

**Create: Enhanced Vanilla** is a modpack that brings the beauty of vanilla gameplay together with the mechanical magic of the **Create mod**. Dive into a world where gears rotate, steam powers innovation, and nature reclaims machinery. Build intricate factories, mechanize with brass and cogwheels, and discover lush landscapes filled with moss-covered ruins and secrets guarded. Whether you're a redstone tinkerer, an adventurer, or a builder this modpack breathes new life into the vanilla experience, without straying too far from its roots.

Features:

⚙️ Fully integrated Create mod experience

🌿 Vanilla+ feel with mossy aesthetics and natural exploration

🏭 Mechanical automation with immersive contraptions

🧭 Light adventuring mods to keep the vanilla spirit alive

🛠️ Designed for performance and creativity

Get ready to rediscover Minecraft as it should always have been — **enhanced**, not overhauled.
